title: BEM-886 workspace promotion
objective:
Run script:
"""
for p in ['governance/workspaces/development','governance/workspaces/testing','governance/workspaces/main','governance/tools','governance/reports','governance/runtime/curator_dispatch']:
    Path(p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

policy = {
  'status':'active',
  'flow':['development','testing','main'],
  'required_for_testing':['artifact_id','source_workspace','target_workspace','task_id','trace_id','owner','validation_status'],
  'required_for_main':['artifact_id','source_workspace','target_workspace','task_id','trace_id','owner','validation_status','proof'],
  'pass_values':['PASS'],
  'log':'governance/workspaces/promotion_log.jsonl'
}
Path('governance/state/workspace_promotion_policy.json').write_text(json.dumps(policy, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

candidate = Path('governance/workspaces/development/BEM886_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE.md')
candidate.write_text('# BEM-886 promotion candidate\n\nStatus: ready_for_testing\n', encoding='utf-8')
proof = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM886_PROMOTION_TEST_PASS.md')
proof.write_text('# BEM-886 promotion test proof\nStatus: PASS\n', encoding='utf-8')

records = [
 {'artifact_id':'BEM886_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE','source_workspace':'development','target_workspace':'testing','task_id':'BEM-882-004','trace_id':'bem886_workspace_promotion','owner':'WRK-C3','validation_status':'PASS','proof':str(proof)},
 {'artifact_id':'BEM886_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE','source_workspace':'testing','target_workspace':'main','task_id':'BEM-882-004','trace_id':'bem886_workspace_promotion','owner':'WRK-C3','validation_status':'PASS','proof':str(proof)}
]
log = Path('governance/workspaces/promotion_log.jsonl')
log.write_text('\n'.join(json.dumps(r, ensure_ascii=False) for r in records) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/workspaces/testing/BEM886_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE.md').write_text(candidate.read_text(encoding='utf-8') + '\nPromoted to testing with PASS.\n', encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/workspaces/main/BEM886_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE.md').write_text(candidate.read_text(encoding='utf-8') + '\nPromoted to main with PASS proof.\n', encoding='utf-8')

errors = []
for line in log.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines():
    rec = json.loads(line)
    req = policy['required_for_main'] if rec.get('target_workspace') == 'main' else policy['required_for_testing']
    for f in req:
        if f not in rec:
            errors.append(rec.get('artifact_id','unknown') + ': missing ' + f)
    if rec.get('validation_status') not in policy['pass_values']:
        errors.append(rec.get('artifact_id','unknown') + ': validation not PASS')
    if rec.get('target_workspace') == 'main' and not Path(rec.get('proof','')).exists():
        errors.append(rec.get('artifact_id','unknown') + ': main proof missing')
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'

tool = '''# BEM-886 workspace promotion validator
import json
from pathlib import Path
policy = json.loads(Path("governance/state/workspace_promotion_policy.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
log = Path(policy["log"])
errors = []
for line in log.read_text(encoding="utf-8").splitlines():
    rec = json.loads(line)
    req = policy["required_for_main"] if rec.get("target_workspace") == "main" else policy["required_for_testing"]
    for field in req:
        if field not in rec:
            errors.append(f"{rec.get('artifact_id','unknown')}: missing {field}")
    if rec.get("target_workspace") == "main" and not Path(rec.get("proof", "")).exists():
        errors.append(f"{rec.get('artifact_id','unknown')}: proof missing")
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_workspace_promotion.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM886_WORKSPACE_PROMOTION.md').write_text('# BEM-886 Workspace promotion checks\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nPromotion log: governance/workspaces/promotion_log.jsonl\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM886_WORKSPACE_PROMOTION_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-886 workspace promotion proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

backlog = Path('governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
if backlog.exists():
    b = json.loads(backlog.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for item in b.get('items', []):
        if item.get('id') == 'BEM-882-004':
            item['status'] = 'completed'
            item['proof'] = str(marker)
        elif 'status' not in item:
            item['status'] = 'pending'
    backlog.write_text(json.dumps(b, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

changed_files.extend(['governance/state/workspace_promotion_policy.json','governance/workspaces/promotion_log.jsonl','governance/workspaces/development/BEM886_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE.md','governance/workspaces/testing/BEM886_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE.md','governance/workspaces/main/BEM886_PROMOTION_CANDIDATE.md','governance/tools/validate_workspace_promotion.py','governance/reports/BEM886_WORKSPACE_PROMOTION.md',str(marker),'governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'])
ops_applied.append('BEM886 workspace promotion ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
